# Responsive Storytelling

## Desktop

- Keep sections scannable and avoid card-heavy decoration.
- Let product/place/object media carry subject matter.
- Keep proof near relevant claims.

## Mobile

- Do not bury the CTA after oversized media.
- Avoid text over busy images unless contrast is verified.
- Keep long words and labels inside containers.
- Show progression between sections without hiding all content below the fold.

## Verification

Check desktop and mobile. Record viewport sizes and whether overlap, overflow, or subject invisibility appears.
